parsed.artifact_title: Scheduler-Boundary Artifact SBD-1: Deterministic Protocol Greenlight for Append-Only Comparison

claims.text: The dry event-loop row records scheduled, claimed, and completed event states.
The dry event-loop row preserves a restart frontier with the scheduled event and carried state.
This v1 harness makes no live provider calls; it is a deterministic protocol-readiness run.

parsed.conclusion: All three required facts are directly supported by the three evidence records drawn from the dry event-loop corpus. The records confirm that (1) scheduler event states are visible in the dry row, (2) the restart frontier is reconstructable from the scheduled event plus carried state, and (3) the v1 harness is a deterministic protocol-readiness run with no live provider calls. Together these findings satisfy the preregistration criteria: the scheduler-loop evidence supports, without any gap requiring further fact-gathering, moving forward to an append-only non-inferiority comparison against the baseline.
parsed.recommended_action: Proceed with the bind-only reset restart protocol. Deepen the scheduler cycle state record and implement the append-only comparison, preserving all prior states in the log and shedding only through explicit `deleted_regions` tags.

The dry event-loop row preserves a restart frontier with the scheduled event and carried state.
This v1 harness makes no live provider calls; it is a deterministic protocol-readiness run.

request_payload.instruction: Write the final artifact. Cite only evidence records that support claims. Do not cite distractors. If a limitation remains, include it in declared_losses.
